title: Fy-Tor-Ana
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Otheruses|Solace}} {{Character |type=Jedi |image=[[File:Solace.jpg]] |name=Fy-Tor-Ana |homeworld= |birth= |death=[[18 BBY/Legends|18 BBY]],''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' the [[Jedi asteroid]]''[[The Last of the Jedi: Reckoning]]'' |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]]''[[The Last of the Jedi: Underworld]]'' |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Female]] |pronouns= |height= |mass= |hair=[[Color/Legends|Brown]] |feathers= |eyes=Blue |skin=Light |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=*[[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] *[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Solace?''"
"''A word I've been hearing more and more lately.|Ferus Olin and Dexter Jettster|}} '''Fy-Tor-Ana''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] as an [[Jedi instructor|instructor]] at the [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] during the waning years of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. After the start of the [[Great Jedi Purge/Legends|Great Jedi Purge]] and establishment of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|New Order]], '''Solace''' was the name she gave herself when she hid underneath the bedrock of Coruscant. Believed to be a location, Solace was discovered by former Jedi [[Ferus Olin]] to be the Jedi Master. ==Biography== A [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]],''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' Fy-Tor-Ana was [[Jedi training/Legends|trained]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]], ascending to the rank of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] after crafting a green-bladed [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] and completing the [[Jedi Trials/Legends|Trials of Knighthood]]. While a respected Jedi she was known as reclusive, rarely interacting with her fellow instructors and refusing to take a [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] for herself. Renowned for her split-second reflexes, her grace, and her agility, Master Ana was appointed as an [[Jedi instructor|instructor]] at the [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] by the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]]. Teaching the technique known as the [[Art of Movement]] to [[Jedi Initiate/Legends|Jedi Initiates]] at the [[Jedi academy|Temple academy]], Master Ana's classes occupied the [[Jedi Temple obstacle course|obstacle course]]. During her time as an instructor, Master Ana instructed countless Initiates, including a young [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]].''[[Jedi Quest: The Dangerous Games]]'' A survivor of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], a bloody conflict between the Republic and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], Master Ana was forced into hiding when [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] issued [[Contingency Orders for the Grand Army of the Republic: Order Initiation, Orders 1 Through 150|Contingency]] [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]] to the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]], effectively disbanding the Jedi Order. Fleeing the slaughter of the [[Great Jedi Purge/Legends|Great Jedi Purge]], Master Ana took shelter on the Jedi-world [[Ilum/Legends|Ilum]] with fellow Master [[Garen Muln]]. Hiding amongst the frozen wastelands' [[Crystal Cave/Legends|Crystal Caves]], Ana was not able to remain ignorant of the state of the Republic for long and soon departed Ilum alone for Coruscant. When Ana did not return, Master Muln feared that she was dead. Muln relayed his information on Fy-Tor-Ana's plans to former Jedi [[Ferus Olin]] who had visited Ilum in search of survivors; Olin then left for Coruscant to find the missing Jedi. In fact, Master Ana had made it to Coruscant and, finding the Jedi Temple in ruins, was forced underground. Delving deep into the crust of the [[Ecumenopolis/Legends|ecumenopolis]], Master Ana assumed control of a settlement established above an expansive subterranean ocean. Taking the name of ''Solace'', Master Ana's existence became mythical, leaving the Jedi behind her and striving to assist those fleeing persecution by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. When Ferus Olin arrived on Coruscant, he heard rumors that Ana was held in the bowels of the Temple. Finding the Temple occupied by [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] but vacant of all Jedi, he followed rumors down to the crust and began seeking what he believed to be a settlement known as ''Solace''. A guide met him at the mouth of the subterranean passage and led Olin down to the hidden city, only then revealing her identity as the former Jedi Master. Rather derisive when Olin attempted to get her to return to the Temple, Ana was finally convinced when Olin explained that Imperial [[Inquisitorius/Legends|Inquisitor]] [[Malorum]] had planted a spy in her midst. Agreeing to help Olin and his associate [[Trever Flume]] infiltrate the Jedi Temple and eliminate Malorum's chances of locating them, she led them into the Temple's heart only to find themselves trapped by Imperials. When they were ambushed, Ana was forced to abandon Olin while escorting the young Flume back out of the Temple, returning to her settlement in the midst of an attack. With her new world burning, she was able to [[Erased|rally survivors]] and flee to the surface. Master Ana and Flume, joined by the [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] [[Oryon]] and former reporter [[Keets Freely]] journeyed to [[Dexter Jettster/Legends|Dexter Jettster's]] hideout and asked him for help finding Olin. They located him on a ship with his friend [[Clive Flax]], escaping the prison world of [[Dontamo]]. They followed Malorum to the planet of [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] and were aided by [[Boss/Legends|Boss]] [[Rugor Nass/Legends|Rugor Nass]] and the [[Gungan/Legends|Gungans]] in their attempt to take back Naboo.''[[The Last of the Jedi: Death on Naboo]]'' Later, when Olin had to help [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] Palpatine on the planet [[Samaria/Legends|Samaria]], Master Ana went to [[Bellassa/Legends|Bellassa]] to rescue [[Roan Lands]] and [[Dona Telamark]], two of Olin's friends, from execution. She went with Oryon and Flume and got help from [[The Eleven]], and was able to succeed. They went to Samaria to help Olin save [[Astri Oddo]] and her son [[Lune Oddo Divinian|Lune]] from stormtroopers. They all escaped except Olin, who stayed on the planet, knowing that Palpatine would have more things for him to do. In their down time, the Jedi and their crew of misfits based themselves on a [[Jedi asteroid|hidden asteroid]] near to Bellassa, preparing it for Olin's dream to locate Jedi survivors there.''[[The Last of the Jedi: Return of the Dark Side]]'' When the asteroid was finally discovered by the Empire, Masters Ana and Muln assured that the young Lune Divinian made it off before the Imperials unleashed the fury of their secret [[Superweapon/Legends|superweapon]], destroying the asteroid and the Jedi. Before her death, Master Ana was at peace with the Force and her allies, proud to die as a Jedi amongst friends. ==Appearances== *''[[Jedi Quest: The Dangerous Games]]'' {{1stm}} *''[[The Last of the Jedi: Dark Warning]]'' {{Mo}} *''[[The Last of the Jedi: Underworld]]'' {{1st}} *''[[The Last of the Jedi: Death on Naboo]]'' *''[[The Last of the Jedi: A Tangled Web]]'' *''[[The Last of the Jedi: Return of the Dark Side]]'' *''[[The Last of the Jedi: Secret Weapon]]'' *''[[The Last of the Jedi: Against the Empire]]'' *''[[The Last of the Jedi: Master of Deception]]'' {{Mo}} *''[[The Last of the Jedi: Reckoning]]'' *''[[Rebel Force: Hostage]]'' {{Mo}} *''[[Rebel Force: Firefight]]'' {{Mo}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Fy-Tor-Ana#legends |es=Fy-Tor-Ana |nl=Fy-Tor-Ana |deFA=1 }} [[Category:Females]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Jedi instructors]] [[Category:Jedi Purge victims]] [[Category:Post-Ruusan Jedi Masters]]
